quests.title: Escape the Mortuary
quests.description: The party woke up in Sigil's Mortuary with no memories and no explanation. The Dustmen aren't pleased. Getting out is the first problem. Understanding why they're here is the second.

objectives.text: Find someone in Sigil who knows what happened

quests.title: The Multiversal Glitch
quests.description: Something is wrong with reality — specifically with the party. Duplicates appear. Memories belong to other lives. The cause is a glitch in the fabric of the multiverse, and the party is caught in the middle of it.

objectives.text: Discover why the party has memory gaps
Understand the nature of the multiversal glitch
Find a way to stabilize or resolve it

quests.title: Find the Missing Modron
quests.description: A modron named Rondixiant vanished while carrying critical information about the glitch. Modrons don't just go missing — something took it, or it fled. Either way, finding it is essential.

objectives.text: Learn who or what Rondixiant is

quests.title: Shemeshka's Game
quests.description: Shemeshka the Marauder knows more about the party's situation than she admits. She's willing to help — for a price, and on her terms. Trusting her is dangerous. Not dealing with her may be worse.

objectives.text: Decide how far to trust her

quests.title: Schemes in Sigil
quests.description: Sigil is a city of factions, each with their own agenda. Navigating the politics, making allies, and avoiding enemies will determine how much freedom the party has to pursue their real goals.

objectives.text: Establish relationships with at least one faction
